reasoning: Inditex is currently around the 11th position among EU tech and luxury giants, trailing Deutsche Telekom by a small margin (around 2.5-3%). Over the remaining ~6 months until the end of 2025, stock prices can easily fluctuate by 10-20%. Given the randomness of stock returns, Inditex has a viable path to overtaking the 10th spot, but must also fend off companies close behind it. The Metaculus community prediction from late May 2025 was 0.31, which strongly incorporates the market's assessment of competitive momentum and currency effects. Placing my estimate close to this well-calibrated community consensus, slightly adjusted for variance.
